title: SNP Calling of Apostichopus japonicus Color-Variants Genome
author: Jihoon Jo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gmbbu2n

steps.title: Realign the reads from assembled genome using BWA
steps.instruction: Realign the reads from assembled genome using BWA.

steps.title: Group the aligned reads, mark and...
steps.instruction: Group the aligned reads, mark and remove duplicate reads using Picard.

steps.title: Realign the reads with indels using GATK RealignerTargetCreator and IndelRealigner
steps.instruction: Realign the reads with indels using GATK RealignerTargetCreator and IndelRealigner.

steps.title: Call SNPs and indels from the...
steps.instruction: Call SNPs and indels from the resulting sequence in step 1-3 using GATK Haplotypecaller.

steps.title: Measure nucleotide diversity in your genome...
steps.instruction: Measure nucleotide diversity in your genome using VCFtools with sliding window analysis (bin 10kb, step 1kb).
